title: C4OS Grill Question 011: Closeout
description: This final question confirms whether the grill is complete and artifacts should be produced next. Submit the form, then paste the generated response back into chat.

questions.label: Is the grill session complete enough to produce freeze artifacts?
options: Yes, stop grilling and produce the selected artifacts next
No, continue grilling Browser implementation risk
No, continue grilling extension execution risk
questions.help: Selected artifacts are MVP freeze document, checkpoint plan, Browser/agent authority ADR, extension enablement/tag ADR, and context promotion.

questions.label: Where should freeze artifacts live?
options: .agents/specs/research/ for freeze and checkpoint docs; docs/adr/ for ADRs
.agents/specs/freeze/ for freeze docs; docs/adr/ for ADRs
plans/ for human docs; .agents/ only for traceability
Decide automatically from existing repo conventions
questions.help: Recommended: keep freeze/checkpoint docs in .agents/specs/research/ for now and ADRs in docs/adr/ per grill-with-docs convention.

questions.label: Anything else before artifact creation?
questions.help: Add final constraints, naming preferences, or anything that should not be written yet.
